steps: Navigate to https://lookerstudio.google.com/navigation/reporting and click 'Blank Report'
In 'Add data to report', click BigQuery > project '{project_id}' > dataset '{dataset}' > table '{table}' > click 'Add' > confirm 'Add to report' if prompted
Click 'Add a chart' in toolbar > select '{chart_type}' > then vision_click(description="{position_description}")
In Setup tab, click the Dimension field > search '{dimension_name}' > select it
Click 'Add a dimension' > search '{dimension_name}' > select it
Click the Metric field > search '{metric_name}' > select it
Click 'Add a metric' > search '{metric_name}' > select it
Enable the 'Show title' toggle at the top of the Style tab, then click the title text input field directly below it, use Ctrl+A to select all, then type '{title_text}'
Click the color swatch for Series 1 > click 'Add custom color' (+) button > in the hex input field use Ctrl+A then type '{color_value}' > click 'Done' or press Enter
Click the 'Font size' dropdown > select '{font_size}' from the list (do not type into the field)
Scroll the Style panel to find X-Axis section, then enable the 'Show axis title' toggle
Scroll the Style panel to find Left Y-Axis section, then enable the 'Show axis title' toggle
Use find_text to search 'Add border shadow' in the Style panel, then click its checkbox to enable
Use find_text to search 'Legend' in the Style panel, click the Legend dropdown to open it, then select '{position}'
Use find_text to search 'Show data labels' in the Style panel, then click its checkbox to enable
Click on the Metric field in the Setup tab to open it, then click the pencil/edit icon, find 'Compact Numbers' toggle in the metric editor, and enable it

Use find_text to search 'Background' in the Style panel, click the background color swatch > click 'Add custom color' (+) > use Ctrl+A then type '{color_value}' in the hex field > click 'Done' or press Enter

With the chart selected, find the size controls in the right property panel (width and height input fields), set width to '{width}' and height to '{height}' by clicking each field, using Ctrl+A to select all, then typing the value
In the Setup tab, click the 'Sort' field > search '{sort_field}' > select it, then click the sort-order toggle to set it to '{sort_order}'
In the Setup tab, click the 'Rows per page' or 'Default number of rows' field, use Ctrl+A to select all, then type '{row_limit}'
Click 'Add a chart' in toolbar > select 'Text' > then vision_click(description="{position_description}")
Double-click the text box to enter edit mode, use Ctrl+A to select all, then type '{text_content}'
Click 'Add a control' in toolbar > select 'Date range control' > then vision_click(description="{position_description}")
